popupRedirectTitle.message: Hello! Thanks for installing our extension

popupRedirectDescription.message: We’ll help you set up your focus companion and preferences.

popupRedirectBody.message: Continue in the options page to choose your cat, review your progress, and finish setup.

popupRedirectFooter.message: You can leave and come back later. Your saved onboarding data will be ready when you return.

homePopupDescription.message: A clean popup shell for the extension while the focus workflow is built out.

homePopupBody.message: Open the options page to configure behavior, site rules, and future focus-session settings.

homePopupFooter.message: Popup logic stays in containers, while the shared card UI remains presentation-only.

homeOptionsDescription.message: This options surface is ready for persisted settings and feature-specific forms.

homeOptionsBody.message: Use this page as the home for storage-backed preferences, Chrome API integrations, and module-specific configuration screens.

homeOptionsFooter.message: The options entrypoint stays thin and delegates orchestration to a container.

onboardingDescription.message: Finish your first setup to personalize the extension and unlock the default popup and options experience.

onboardingStepTwoDescription.message: This placeholder keeps the onboarding flow valid while the next setup screen is being built.

onboardingStepThreeDescription.message: Complete onboarding to switch the extension into its normal popup and options experience.

onboardingStepPlaceholderNote.message: This step is intentionally lightweight for now, but the navigation and persisted onboarding state are already wired.

catSetupDescription.message: Pick a name and choose two fur colors. You can come back later and your saved values will be prefilled.

validationCatNameRequired.message: Enter a name for your cat.
